text:
Once upon a time, there was a curious fox who loved to explore. One morning, after a refreshing shower, he decided to explore the new area just beyond the forest.

As he wandered, a charming little bird chirped cheerfully. "Good morning!" the bird sang.

"Good morning!" the fox echoed. He liked birds. He visited the bird often.

Further along, he came across a beautiful pond. The ice was starting to crack, the water shimmering like glass under the sun. He hesitated for a bit, then took a deep breath and jumped in.

He surfaced next to a small duck paddling around. "Hey there," the duck squawked. "You've got neat fur."

"That's just a lucky coat," the fox replied with a chuckle.

The duck squawked delightedly. "It must ward off predators?"

"Hmm? Oh, possibly." The fox laughed. "Just a curious pet."
